critical_issues.title: Missing canUseTool callback
critical_issues.description: SDK requires canUseTool callback for permission prompts. Without it, permission requests have no handler.
critical_issues.fix: Add canUseTool callback to query() options that routes to modal queue

critical_issues.title: Ignoring unhandled SDK events
critical_issues.description: Many SDK event types are silently dropped including SDKStatusMessage which may contain permission mode changes.
critical_issues.fix: Handle additional event types or at minimum log them in development

critical_issues.title: MCP vs SDK mechanisms conflated
critical_issues.description: MCP tools (ask_user) work but SDK-native features (permission prompts, /model) don't because they use different mechanisms.
critical_issues.fix: Implement canUseTool for SDK permissions, use Query interface methods for slash commands

major_issues.title: No tests for SDK permission flow
major_issues.description: Test suite only covers MCP tool happy paths, not SDK permission callbacks

major_issues.title: Silent event dropping
major_issues.description: Unhandled events logged nowhere, making debugging difficult
